cells.rationale: A subtle concurrency-correctness invariant in the autopilot escalation dispatch path — a per-checkout occupancy guard that must serialize same-checkout sessions yet stay non-terminal, marker-free, row-free, re-sweepable, and role-keyed — is a named intelligence-bound opus gate, at the model-default effort band since it extends an existing single-file skip-outcome pattern.
